heroHeadline: IDF Strikes 170+ Targets Day 32; Iran Hits VLCC in Dubai Port; US Gas Hits $4; Iran Sends Peace Counter-Reply; Lebanon Bans Hezbollah Military Wing
heroSubtitle: IDF/USAF struck 170+ targets over Tehran, Isfahan, Shiraz, Parchin on Day 32 — drone factories, warhead casting plants, military HQ (11,000+ total targets since Feb 28); Iran retaliated by striking Kuwaiti VLCC Al Salmi at Port of Dubai raising oil spill fears; US national gas price hit $4.02/gallon first time since 2022; Iran formally sent counter-reply to Trump's 15-point peace proposal via Pakistan — terms rejected as 'unrealistic'; Lebanon government took unprecedented step of banning Hezbollah military wing and writing to UN; IAEA Board emergency session on nuclear facility strikes; April 6 Hormuz deadline looms
footerNote: Data updated 2026-03-31. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, NPR, Bloomberg, Time, IAEA, Rosatom, Pakistan Foreign Ministry.
